author: anon-a7c6025f
content: bmm + permute_0213 rewrite results: 50 tokens in 73s (1.5s/tok), down from 123s (2.5s/tok). Attention forward is now fully GPU-resident — zero data_vec calls. Remaining transfers are from: (1) reshape clone_buffer (~12 per layer — reshape clones GPU buffer handles which might involve driver calls), (2) softmax CPU→GPU→CPU if kernel fails to load, (3) scale/mask tensor uploads (once per forward call). Next optimization: check if reshape clone_buffer is actually doing a memcpy.
